plan.title: Add capacity allocation accounting with buckets, windows, and capacity:show

narratives.Description: Adds plan.policy.capacityAllocation with protected buckets, trailing-window accounting, kind-aware counting, a minSampleSize guard, and a task capacity:show surface that reports target-versus-actual mix with outcome and cost overlays. Cost capture and the Warp Analytics API sync are deferred sub-parts pending upstream access, so this story still carries open design questions.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Add scripts/capacity_show.py and scripts/verify_capacity.py that derive bucket tallies from the lifecycle folders, and stamp capacityBucket plus completedAt in scripts/scope_lifecycle.py at completion. 2. Add tests in tests/cli/test_capacity_show.py asserting deficit math, the minSampleSize advisory fallback, and kind-aware epic counting against fixtures.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer, I want effort tracked against protected buckets, so that debt paydown is not starved by urgent work.

items.title: Given fewer classified completions than minSampleSize, when capacity:show runs, then it reports advisory mode and defers to ordering.

narrative.Acceptance: Given fewer classified completions than minSampleSize, when capacity:show runs, then it reports advisory mode and defers to ordering.

items.title: When an epic has no children, then capacity counting attributes its estimatedChildren weight to the parent bucket.

narrative.Acceptance: When an epic has no children, then capacity counting attributes its estimatedChildren weight to the parent bucket.

items.title: When scope:complete runs, then it stamps capacityBucket and completedAt onto the completed vBRIEF.

narrative.Acceptance: When scope:complete runs, then it stamps capacityBucket and completedAt onto the completed vBRIEF.

items.title: Given completed work over the trailing window, when capacity:show runs, then it renders per-bucket target-versus-actual deficits.

narrative.Acceptance: Given completed work over the trailing window, when capacity:show runs, then it renders per-bucket target-versus-actual deficits.

expected_outputs: capacity:show renders target-versus-actual bucket mix with overlays
scope:complete stamps capacityBucket and completedAt on completion

references.title: Issue #1419: RFC: Agentic Prioritization & Coordination Model for Deft Directive
